have h1 : M.encard = ν(G) := by
    rw [MatchingNumber]
    have h2 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by
      refine' ⟨M, h.1, rfl⟩
    have h3 : ∀ n, n ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} → n ≤ M.encard := by
      intro n hn
      rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
      have h4 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
        apply h.2 M' hM'
      linarith [hn, h4]
    have h4 : M.encard = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by
      rw [sSup_eq_iff]
      constructor
      · -- Show that M.encard is in the set
        exact h2
      · -- Show that M.encard is the least upper bound
        intro n hn
        have h5 : n ≤ M.encard := h3 n hn
        linarith
    exact h4
  exact h1

have h1 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
    refine' ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩
  have h2 : ∀ n, n ∈ {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} → n ≤ M.encard := by
    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
    have h3 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
      apply h.max
      exact hM'
    linarith
  rw [show ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} by rfl]
  rw [sSup_eq_iff]
  constructor
  · exact h1
  · intro n hn
    apply h2 n hn

have h1 : ∀ M', G.IsMatching M' → M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
    intro M' hM'
    exact h.max hM'
  have h2 : M.encard = ν(G) := by
    rw [show ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} by rfl]
    rw [sSup_eq_iff]
    constructor
    · -- Show that M.encard is in the set
      use M
      all_goals
        simp [h]
    · -- Show that M.encard is the maximum element in the set
      intro n hn
      rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
      have h3 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := h1 M' hM'
      linarith [hn, h3]
  exact h2

have h1 : M.encard = ν(G) := by
    rw [MatchingNumber]
    have h2 : M.encard = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by
      have h3 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by
        refine' ⟨M, h.1, rfl⟩
      have h4 : ∀ n, n ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} → n ≤ M.encard := by
        intro n hn
        rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
        have h5 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
          apply h.2
          exact hM'
        linarith
      have h6 : sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} = M.encard := by
        rw [sSup_eq_iff]
        constructor
        · -- Show that M.encard is in the set
          exact h3
        · -- Show that M.encard is the least upper bound
          intro n hn
          have h7 : n ≤ M.encard := h4 n hn
          exact h7
      exact h6
    exact h2
  exact h1

have h1 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by 
    refine' ⟨M, h.1, rfl⟩
  have h2 : ∀ n, n ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} → n ≤ M.encard := by 
    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
    have h3 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by 
      apply h.2 M' hM'
    rw [hn]
    exact h3
  have h3 : M.encard = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by 
    rw [sSup_eq_iff]
    constructor
    · -- Show that M.encard is in the set
      exact h1
    · -- Show that M.encard is the least upper bound
      intro n hn
      have h4 : ∀ m, m ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} → m ≤ n := by 
        intro m hm
        have h5 : m ≤ M.encard := h2 m hm
        linarith
      have h5 : M.encard ≤ n := by 
        have h6 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := h1
        specialize hn M.encard h6
        linarith
      linarith
  rw [show ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} by rfl]
  exact h3

  have h2 : ∀ M', IsMatching G M' → M'.encard ≤ M.encard := by
    intro M' hM'
    exact h.2 hM'
  have h5 : ν(G) = M.encard := by
    rw [MatchingNumber]
    rw [sSup_eq_iff]
    constructor
    · -- Show that M.encard is indeed an upper bound
      intro n hn
      rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
      have h5 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := h2 M' hM'
      linarith
    · -- Show that M.encard is the least upper bound
      intro b hb
      have h6 : M.encard ≤ b := by
        have h7 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M, IsMatching G M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
          refine' ⟨M, h1, rfl⟩
        have h8 : M.encard ≤ b := by
          apply hb
          exact h7
        exact h8
      linarith
  exact h5.symm

      refine ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
    have h4 : M.encard ≤ sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by
      apply sSup_le
      exact h3
    rw [show ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} by rfl] at *
    exact h4
  have h2 : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
    have h3 : ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by rfl
    rw [h3]
    apply le_sSup
    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
    have h4 : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hmax M' hM'
    linarith [hn, h4]
  linarith [h1, h2]

    apply le_sSup

    intro n hn
    rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩

    linarith
  have h3 : M.encard = (sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} : ℕ∞) := by
